---
description: "Use when you want to review existing code, fix issues, and revalidate until approved."
---
# Review Cycle Workflow

## Goal
Validate and improve existing code.

---

## Steps

### 1. Review
Use agent: code-reviewer

---

### 2. Fix
Use agent: auto-fix

---

### 3. Validate
Use agent: pre-commit-reviewer

---

## Loop

Repeat until APPROVED

---

## When to Use

- After manual coding
- Before commit
- Before PR
